introSection: Il Tempo Extra Gigante (English: Extra Giant Time) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Hunderfossen Eventyrpark in Fåberg, Oppland, Norway.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and dark green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble the Il Tempo Extra Gigante, a car featured in the Norwegian stop-motion film The Pinchcliffe Grand Prix. This movie is based on books by Norwegian author Kjell Aukrust. This ties back into the norwegian stories and lore theme of the park.

fullText:
Il Tempo Extra Gigante (English: Extra Giant Time) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Hunderfossen Eventyrpark in Fåberg, Oppland, Norway.



Red track and dark green supports.

The train is designed to resemble the Il Tempo Extra Gigante, a car featured in the Norwegian stop-motion film The Pinchcliffe Grand Prix. This movie is based on books by Norwegian author Kjell Aukrust. This ties back into the norwegian stories and lore theme of the park.
